methods.name: LiTAMIN2
methods.summary: KL-divergence ICP with aggressive point reduction for fast scan-to-map registration.

methods.name: GICP
methods.summary: Plane-to-plane ICP with local covariance modeling and Mahalanobis distance.

methods.name: Voxel-GICP
methods.summary: Voxel-level GICP acceleration for compact covariance-aware registration.

methods.name: VGICP-SLAM
methods.summary: Voxel-GICP front-end with Scan Context loop candidates and a lightweight pose graph.

methods.name: small_gicp
methods.summary: Compact GICP with voxel downsampling and capped correspondences.

methods.name: NDT
methods.summary: Normal Distributions Transform style registration with voxel Gaussian models.

methods.name: KISS-ICP
methods.summary: KISS-ICP style odometry with voxel hashing and robust ICP updates.

methods.name: GenZ-ICP
methods.summary: GenZ-ICP style odometry blending point-to-plane and point-to-point with adaptive weighting for degeneracy robustness.

methods.name: RKO-LIO
methods.summary: RKO-LIO style scan-to-map odometry using an IMU gyro rotation prior, with constant-velocity fallback when no IMU is present.

methods.name: A-LOAM
methods.summary: Curvature features with a three-stage odom-to-map LOAM pipeline.

methods.name: F-LOAM
methods.summary: Lightweight LOAM pipeline with input thinning and sparse map updates.

methods.name: ISC-LOAM
methods.summary: Intensity descriptor LOAM with F-LOAM and GICP loop graph components.

methods.name: LOAM Livox
methods.summary: LOAM adaptation for solid-state LiDAR using azimuth-sector pseudo scan lines.

methods.name: LeGO-LOAM
methods.summary: Ground-aware feature extraction for vehicle-oriented LOAM.

methods.name: MULLS
methods.summary: Multi-metric scan-to-map alignment with edge, plane, and point residuals.

methods.name: BALM2
methods.summary: Local bundle adjustment over recent keyframes with line and plane residuals.

methods.name: SuMa
methods.summary: Dense surfel odometry from range-image maps.

methods.name: DLO
methods.summary: Direct keyframe odometry that aligns dense scans to a local GICP map.

methods.name: HDL Graph SLAM
methods.summary: NDT front-end with floor priors, Scan Context, and GICP loop closures.

methods.name: CT-ICP
methods.summary: Continuous-time registration with two poses per frame and SLERP compensation.

methods.name: X-ICP
methods.summary: Constrained ICP using Hessian SVD to classify observable directions.

methods.name: RELEAD
methods.summary: Constrained ESIKF with projection-based suppression along degenerate directions.

methods.name: CT-ICP + RELEAD
methods.summary: Continuous-time CT-ICP interpolation combined with RELEAD degeneracy handling.

methods.name: IMU Preintegration
methods.summary: SO(3) preintegration with first-order bias correction for inertial pipelines.

methods.name: CT-LIO
methods.summary: Lightweight LIO combining CT-ICP interpolation with IMU preintegration constraints.

methods.name: DLIO
methods.summary: DLIO-style direct LiDAR-inertial odometry built on dense registration and preintegration.

methods.name: LINS
methods.summary: Iterated-filter LiDAR-inertial estimator with point-to-plane updates.

methods.name: Point-LIO
methods.summary: Direct LIO with raw-point planarity correspondences and iterated filtering.

methods.name: CLINS
methods.summary: Sequence-pipeline version of CT-LIO style continuous-time registration.

methods.name: LIO-SAM
methods.summary: Pose graph with A-LOAM front-end, Scan Context, GICP, and IMU priors.

methods.name: FAST-LIO2
methods.summary: Direct LIO with raw-point scan-to-map alignment and IMU prediction.

methods.name: FAST-LIO-SLAM
methods.summary: FAST-LIO2 front-end with Scan Context and GICP loop-closure graph SLAM.

methods.name: CUBE-LIO Repro
methods.summary: Cubemap intensity and gradient front-end reproduction for CUBE-LIO style experiments.

methods.name: VILENS
methods.summary: Visual-lidar-inertial smoother with Point-LIO style local maps and reprojection fusion.

methods.name: LVI-SAM
methods.summary: Visual-lidar-inertial SLAM built on a LIO-SAM style pose graph.

methods.name: VINS-Fusion
methods.summary: Compact visual-inertial odometry with landmark reprojection and preintegration.

methods.name: OKVIS
methods.summary: Fixed-window visual-inertial odometry with landmark reprojection factors.

methods.name: ORB-SLAM3
methods.summary: Visual-inertial SLAM with keyframe graph and overlap-based loop closure.

methods.name: FAST-LIVO2
methods.summary: Local visual-lidar-inertial odometry built on FAST-LIO2 poses and reprojection residuals.

methods.name: R2LIVE
methods.summary: Visual-lidar-inertial SLAM combining FAST-LIO2 odometry and visual landmark factors.

methods.name: Scan Context
methods.summary: Polar ring-sector descriptors with yaw-shift search for place recognition.

methods.name: Adaptive-ICP
methods.summary: Reliable-initial-pose adaptive ICP: density-filtered coarse pose vs constant-velocity prediction, motion-state-weighted sigma_th, robust point-to-plane (arXiv:2509.22058).

methods.name: D2-LIO
methods.summary: Adaptive per-point outlier threshold + scan-to-submap IMU prior + degeneracy-aware hybrid weighting (arXiv:2508.14355).

methods.name: CT-VoxelMap
methods.summary: Probabilistic adaptive voxel map (running mu/Sigma), point-uncertainty propagation, Mahalanobis hybrid point-to-plane/point-to-distribution (arXiv:2604.03747).

methods.name: R-VoxelMap
methods.summary: Recursive octree plane fitting with outlier detect-and-reuse, plane-variance-weighted point-to-plane (arXiv:2601.12377).

methods.name: DegenSense
methods.summary: Real-time degeneracy factor (Hessian condition number) + median+k*MAD outlier detection + IMU/LiDAR pose fusion (arXiv:2412.07513).

methods.name: Vibration-LIO
methods.summary: Post-undistortion point covariance with IMU-MAD vibration intensity, Mahalanobis-weighted point-to-plane (arXiv:2507.04311).

methods.name: BIEVR-LIO
methods.summary: Bump image (per-voxel oriented height grid); image gradients add in-plane constraints to point-to-plane residual (arXiv:2604.14421).

methods.name: UA-LIO
methods.summary: Gaussian voxel map, distribution-to-distribution uncertainty weighting, ground-plane z-constraint (IEEE TIM 2025).

methods.name: DTD
methods.summary: Density Triangle Descriptor: BEV density keypoints + rotation/translation-invariant triangle descriptor with entropy, hash voting + SVD verification (PMC 2025).

methods.name: DAMM-LOAM
methods.summary: Degeneracy-aware multi-metric LiDAR odometry: range-image normal-class weighting (ground/wall/edge) + Hessian-eigenvalue degeneracy boost (arXiv:2510.13287).

methods.name: LODESTAR
methods.summary: Degeneracy-aware LiDAR odometry: condition-number Schmidt-Kalman anchoring of degenerate directions to a sliding-window constant-velocity prediction (DA-ASKF) + localizability-based data exploitation/pruning (DA-DE) (arXiv:2511.09142).

starter_tracks.label: Quick Smoke
starter_tracks.title: Quick Smoke
starter_tracks.note: Smallest path from clone to comparable LiDAR numbers.

starter_tracks.label: Accuracy First
starter_tracks.title: Accuracy First
starter_tracks.note: Scan-to-map methods that currently anchor the Istanbul benchmark snapshot.

starter_tracks.label: Fusion
starter_tracks.title: LiDAR-Inertial Fusion
starter_tracks.note: Start here when IMU data is available and timing matters.

starter_tracks.label: Degeneracy
starter_tracks.title: Degeneracy-Aware Stack
starter_tracks.note: Methods aimed at tunnels, corridors, and weak geometric constraints.
